title: Prism V3 Crisis Signal
description: Schema for cross-domain crisis signal detection in the Prism V3 experiment. Each record captures a detected crisis-level event combining anomalous signals from multiple simulated apps.

user_id.description: Identifier of the simulated user for whom the crisis signal was detected.

day.description: Day index within the simulation window when the crisis signal was detected.

level.description: Crisis severity level: 1 (low concern), 2 (moderate concern), 3 (high concern).

signals.description: Individual anomalous data points that contributed to this crisis signal.

app.description: Name of the source app that produced this signal (e.g. 'dailyn', 'ururu', 'mealens').

field.description: Specific data field that exhibited the anomaly (e.g. 'mood_score', 'daily_total', 'sleep_hours').

value.description: The observed anomalous value. Type varies depending on the source field.

source_apps.description: List of app names that contributed signals to this crisis detection.

cross_domain_convergence.description: Whether anomalous signals from multiple domains converged to reinforce this crisis detection.

description.description: Human-readable narrative describing the crisis signal and its context.

recommended_action.description: Recommended response action based on the severity and nature of the crisis signal.
